points.text: Context Therapeutics — advancing T cell engaging (TCE) bispecific antibodies for solid tumors — added to Russell 2000 and Russell 3000 indexes effective June 26, 2026.

VERAXA Biotech — novel conditionally active T cell engagers (BiTAC) and bispecific ADCs (bs ADCs) — recorded tangible industry interest at BIO International; targeting first BiTAC-TCE candidate VXA-102 IND/CTA readiness by early 2028.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals nominated two Enhanced Brain Delivery (EBD) candidates for Alzheimer's disease, including a bispecific antibody derived from sabirnetug and a novel AβO-selective antibody (ACU234), leveraging JCR Pharmaceuticals' J-Brain Cargo transferrin-receptor-targeting technology.

Genmab's epcoritamab, a T-cell engaging bispecific antibody, achieved a 60% reduction in risk of disease progression and death (HR 0.40) in the Phase 3 EPCORE DLBCL-4 trial for relapsed/refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma when combined with lenalidomide.

Johnson & Johnson's teclistamab, a bispecific antibody, received a positive CHMP recommendation for combination with daratumumab in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, showing 83% overall survival at 3 years in Phase 3 data.

The European Commission approved Genmab's TEPKINLY (epcoritamab) in combination with lenalidomide and rituximab for relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma, expanding the indication for this bispecific antibody.
Biocytogen entered a global collaboration with Whitehawk Therapeutics to develop bispecific antibody-drug conjugates (BsADCs) using Biocytogen's RenLite platform.
Context Therapeutics — CTIM-76, CT-95, CT-202 — Solid Tumors — advancing Claudin 6 x CD3, Mesothelin x CD3, and Nectin-4 x CD3 TCE bispecific antibodies as core portfolio assets.

VERAXA Biotech — BiTAC-TCE and BiTAC-ADC programs — Solid Tumors — four BiTAC-based T cell engager programs and two bispecific ADCs (bs ADCs) in pipeline; VXA-102 targeted for IND/CTA readiness by Q1 2028.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals — Bispecific antibody (sabirnetug-derived) — Alzheimer's disease — Nominated as EBD candidate combining AβO-selective antibody with JCR's J-Brain Cargo transferrin-receptor-targeting technology; IND-enabling activities ongoing for mid-2027 submission.
Context Therapeutics — CTIM-76 — Platinum-resistant ovarian cancer — Phase 1 interim data: 29% confirmed overall response rate (RECIST v1.1) in patients with median 7 prior lines of therapy.

Genmab — Epcoritamab (TEPKINLY) — Relapsed/Refractory Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma — Phase 3 EPCORE DLBCL-4 met primary endpoint: 60% risk reduction in progression/death (HR 0.40, p<0.0001) vs R-GemOx; chemotherapy-free regimen.
Genmab — Epcoritamab (TEPKINLY) — Relapsed/Refractory Follicular Lymphoma — European Commission approved combination with lenalidomide and rituximab for treatment of R/R FL.

Johnson & Johnson — Tecvayli (teclistamab) — Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — EMA CHMP recommended approval for combination with daratumumab; Phase 3 data showed 83% 3-year overall survival and >90% 3-year PFS for patients progression-free at 6 months.

Johnson & Johnson — TECVAYLI (teclistamab) — Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — CHMP recommended extension of indication for teclistamab (BCMAxCD3 bispecific) combined with daratumumab; mechanism involves T-cell activation and immune microenvironment modulation.

Biocytogen — Whitehawk Therapeutics — Bispecific ADCs — Global collaboration established to develop ~5 bispecific antibodies from RenLite platform combined with Whitehawk's ADC linker-payload technologies.
Context Therapeutics — TCE bispecific antibody portfolio expansion — CTIM-76 (Claudin 6 x CD3), CT-95 (Mesothelin x CD3), CT-202 (Nectin-4 x CD3) — clinical-stage development for solid tumors.

VERAXA Biotech — BiTAC platform monetization and bs ADC partnering — VXA-102 (BiTAC-TCE) + bsADC program with OmniAb — aiming for first BiTAC-TCE IND by 2028; non-BiTAC assets (VXA-901, HER2 ADC) available for partnership.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals — Development of bispecific antibodies for CNS delivery — Sabirnetug-derived bispecific + ACU234 — Exercised option with JCR Pharmaceuticals; candidates designed for 14-40x higher brain penetration in NHPs vs native antibodies.

Genmab — Bispecific antibody commercialization and expansion — Epcoritamab (DuoBody-CD3xCD20) — Phase 3 EPCORE DLBCL-4 positive results; EC approval for FL indication; global regulatory submissions planned for DLBCL combination.

Johnson & Johnson — Bispecific antibody standard-of-care establishment — Tecvayli (teclistamab) + Daratumumab — CHMP positive opinion for R/R multiple myeloma; data supports 3-year OS of 83% in second-line setting.

Biocytogen — Bispecific ADC platform commercialization — RenLite platform (providing ~5 bispecific antibodies) — Global partnership with Whitehawk Therapeutics; revenue via upfront, milestones, and royalties.
Whitehawk Therapeutics — ADC linker-payload technology integration — Bispecific ADC candidates (option to advance) — Holds global rights option and full program control upon advancement of BsADCs.

CTIM-76 — Mechanism: Claudin 6 x CD3 T cell engager bispecific antibody — Phase: 1 — Population: Platinum-resistant ovarian cancer (PROC) patients with median 7 prior lines — Endpoints: 29% confirmed overall response rate per RECIST v1.1.
CT-95 — Mechanism: Mesothelin x CD3 T cell engaging bispecific antibody — Phase: Preclinical/Early clinical — Population: Solid tumors — Status: Part of Context Therapeutics pipeline.
CT-202 — Mechanism: Nectin-4 x CD3 T cell engaging bispecific antibody — Phase: Preclinical/Early clinical — Population: Solid tumors — Status: Part of Context Therapeutics pipeline.
VXA-102 — Mechanism: BiTAC conditionally active T cell engager bispecific — Phase: Preclinical/IND-enabling — Population: Solid tumors — Endpoints: IND/CTA readiness targeted for early 2028.

VERAXA bs ADCs — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody-drug conjugates with traditional molecular design — Phase: Early development — Population: Solid tumors — Status: Two programs in partnership with OmniAb, Inc.

Sabirnetug-derived bispecific — Mechanism: AβO-selective antibody fused with J-Brain Cargo transferrin-receptor-targeting moiety — Phase: Preclinical/IND-enabling — Population: Alzheimer's disease — Results: 14-40x higher brain antibody levels in non-human primates compared to native antibodies.

Epcoritamab — Mechanism: T-cell engaging bispecific antibody (DuoBody-CD3xCD20) — Phase: 3 (EPCORE DLBCL-4) — Population: Relapsed/refractory DLBCL (≥1 prior line) — Comparator: R-GemOx — Endpoints/Results: 60% reduction in progression/death risk (HR 0.40, p<0.0001); chemotherapy-free fixed duration regimen.

Tecvayli (teclistamab) — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody targeting BCMA and CD3 (complementary with daratumumab CD38 modulation) — Phase: 3 — Population: Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (≥1 prior therapy) — Comparator: Standard therapy — Endpoints/Results: 83% 3-year overall survival; >90% 3-year PFS for patients progression-free at 6 months.

RenLite-derived bispecific antibodies — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody platform — Phase: Preclinical discovery — Population: N/A — Comparator: N/A — Status: ~5 candidates provided to Whitehawk for evaluation with ADC linker-payloads.
VERAXA Biotech — Strategic partnering for bispecific ADCs — bsADC program with OmniAb, Inc. — leveraging traditional molecular design bsADCs alongside BiTAC platform for monetization.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals / JCR Pharmaceuticals — Option exercise for EBD program — Sabirnetug-derived bispecific + ACU234 — Acumen exercised option under license agreement to advance two candidates combining Acumen's antibody expertise with JCR's J-Brain Cargo technology.
Context Therapeutics — Equity compensation — Inducement grant — Granted 146,000 non-qualified stock options to new employee at $0.70/share exercise price; 10-year term, 4-year vesting.
Genmab — Regulatory milestone — Epcoritamab (TEPKINLY) — European Commission granted approval for combination with lenalidomide and rituximab for relapsed/refractory follicular lymphoma.

Johnson & Johnson — Regulatory milestone — Tecvayli (teclistamab) — EMA CHMP issued positive opinion for combination with daratumumab in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, advancing toward EU marketing authorization.

Biocytogen / Whitehawk Therapeutics — Global collaboration for bispecific ADCs — Deal terms include upfront payment, development/regulatory/commercial milestones, and low single-digit royalties; Whitehawk may secure global rights.
